proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P7
; LINE: 441
; PROVEN: coveragePct in [0, 100]
; Numerator = contracts.length - totalUnverified; fraction = numerator / contracts.length
(declare-const contracts_length Int)
(declare-const total_unverified Int)
(declare-const numerator Int)
; Code transition: contracts_length > 0 (guard passed)
(assert (> contracts_length 0))
; Code transition: 0 <= totalUnverified <= contracts.length (proven at VP7)
(assert (>= total_unverified 0))
(assert (<= total_unverified contracts_length))
; Code transition: numerator = contracts.length - totalUnverified
(assert (= numerator (- contracts_length total_unverified)))
; Negated property: numerator < 0 (would produce negative coverage %)
(assert (< numerator 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: VIOLATION: "signals have proofs" includes contracts with violations but zero proven properties
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 441
; VIOLATION: "signals have proofs" includes contracts with violations but zero proven properties
; isUnverified = proven.length === 0 && violations.length === 0
; A contract with violations.length > 0 and proven.length = 0 is counted as "covered"
(declare-const proven_length Int)
(declare-const violations_length Int)
(declare-const is_unverified Int)
(declare-const counted_as_covered Int)
; Code transition: array lengths are non-negative
(assert (>= proven_length 0))
(assert (>= violations_length 0))
; Code transition: isUnverified = (proven.length === 0 && violations.length === 0)
(assert (=> (and (= proven_length 0) (= violations_length 0)) (= is_unverified 1)))
(assert (=> (not (and (= proven_length 0) (= violations_length 0))) (= is_unverified 0)))
; Code transition: counted_as_covered when is_unverified = 0
(assert (=> (= is_unverified 0) (= counted_as_covered 1)))
(assert (=> (= is_unverified 1) (= counted_as_covered 0)))
; Violation: contract has zero proven properties but is counted as "having proofs"
(assert (= proven_length 0))
(assert (> violations_length 0))
(assert (= counted_as_covered 1))
(check-sat)
